summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 4 new features: Flight Notes, Announcements, Student Progress Tracker, and WhatsApp/Gmail integration. Backend APIs working at 95% success rate, frontend UI fully functional.

minor_bugs.issue: Phone fields missing from existing instructors and students
minor_bugs.impact: New feature not populated for existing records
minor_bugs.note: Expected behavior for new feature - works for new records

passed_tests: Flight Notes CRUD: create, view, filter by student, delete
Flight Notes UI: Add note dialog with all form fields working
Announcements CRUD: create, list, edit, delete with priority and target_role
Announcements UI: New announcement dialog with all form fields working
Student Progress Tracker: POST /api/progress (mark exercise) working
Student Progress UI: Student selection dropdown working
Student Progress UI: 5 stage progress cards displayed (PPL, CPL, IR, FIC, ME)
Student Progress UI: Progress percentages and exercise counts displayed
WhatsApp Share UI: Share button and dialog working
Email notification: POST /api/notifications/send-email correctly returns 503 (Gmail not configured)
Stages with sub_stages: GET /api/stages returns sub_stages array
Phone fields: Working for new instructor/student records
Navigation: All new pages accessible from sidebar menu
